query: SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) as val_len, SUBSTRING(configValue, 1, 20) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE '%LIVE%' OR configKey LIKE '%live%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) as val_len, SUBSTRING(configValue, 1, 20) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE '%LIVE%' OR configKey LIKE '%live%'
